kubejs.reaction.r1_light_naphtha_isomeri: Isomerizes linear C5-C7 alkanes from light naphtha into branched isomers (isopentane, isohexane, isooctane) with zeolite catalyst. Produces ~5% light ends byproduct. Raises octane number for gasoline blending.
kubejs.reaction.r2_heavy_naphtha_reformi: Reforms heavy naphtha (C7-C10) over zeolite catalyst at high temperature and pressure into reformate, BTX aromatics, hydrogen, and light ends. Primary source of aromatic feedstocks for the plastic chain.
kubejs.reaction.r3_raw_kerosene_hydrotre: Hydrotreats raw kerosene with hydrogen: saturates naphthalene (C10H8 + 5H2 → decane-range product) and removes trace sulfur as H2S. Produces ~98% kerosene-range product with minimal sour gas.
kubejs.reaction.r4a_tetradecane_hydrotre: Hydrotreats tetradecane (C14) with hydrogen over a cobalt catalyst. Desulfurizes and saturates the gas-oil fraction without changing carbon chain length — required before diesel blending.
kubejs.reaction.r4b_hexadecane_hydrotrea: Hydrotreats hexadecane (C16) with hydrogen over a cobalt catalyst. Desulfurizes and saturates the gas-oil fraction without changing carbon chain length — required before diesel blending.
kubejs.reaction.r4c_octadecane_hydrotrea: Hydrotreats octadecane (C18) with hydrogen over a cobalt catalyst. Desulfurizes and saturates the gas-oil fraction without changing carbon chain length — required before diesel blending.
kubejs.reaction.r5_long_residue_thermal_: Thermally cracks long residue (C20+) into cracked gasoline, cracked diesel, light ends, and petroleum coke. Superheated, high-pressure operation. No catalyst required.
kubejs.reaction.r6_kerosene_steam_cracki: Steam-cracks kerosene into light olefins (ethylene, propylene, butadiene), BTX aromatics, light ends, and hydrogen. Superheated, high-pressure. Primary olefin source for plastic production.
kubejs.reaction.r7a_tetradecane_catalyti: Catalytically cracks tetradecane (C14) into gasoline-range hexane and octane. Converts diesel feedstock into naphtha for the reforming and isomerization chain — not a diesel-upgrading step.
kubejs.reaction.r7b_hexadecane_catalytic: Catalytically cracks hexadecane (C16) into heptane and nonane for the catalytic reforming chain. Converts diesel feedstock into naphtha — not a diesel-upgrading step.
kubejs.reaction.r7c_octadecane_catalytic: Catalytically cracks octadecane (C18) into octane and decane. Produces gasoline- and kerosene-range products from diesel feedstock — not a diesel-upgrading step.
kubejs.reaction.r8_gasoline_re_reforming: Severe reforming of gasoline-range hydrocarbons over zeolite catalyst into BTX aromatics, light ends, and hydrogen. Maximizes aromatic yield from fuel fractions at the cost of fuel volume.
kubejs.reaction.r9_light_ends_steam_refo: Steam-reforms methane (CH4 + H2O → CO + 3H2) over a nickel catalyst into synthesis gas. Accepts light ends streams dominated by methane.
